_comment: Ken punish options ranked by expected damage (descending). The engine walks this list top-to-bottom, simulates each option's interception against the opponent's current move, keeps the first option that (a) physically connects and (b) passes the delta_HP guard (damage_inflicted - damage_taken > 0, or trade survivable when Ken.hp > damage_taken). Hand-editable: tweak damages, reorder, add/remove options without recompiling. Sequence entries are ActionIds resolved via resolveMotion().

options.notes: Max damage. Requires Ken to land in cHP range during Ryu recovery.
j.HK is slightly more lenient timing than j.HP on deep jump-ins.
Used when Ken lands a hair too far for cHP; sHP has longer reach.
4-hit combo with tight link windows (cLK→cMK=3f). Higher stun build.
No-jump punish when Ken is already in cHP range.
sHP reaches a bit further than cHP when Ken is standing.
Mid-range poke-cancel. Most reliable footsie punish in Ken's kit.
Solo DP, 5f invincible startup, knockdown. Best mono-hit damage.
Long reach, knockdown, 7f startup. Preferred when cHP range unsafe.
Solo cHP — fast, no knockdown. Leaves Ken neutral-positive.
Back-jump with HK kick. Evades ground attacks, counter-hits any follow-up.
Vertical jump HK. Preserves stage position, evades sweeps/lows.
Pure evasion, no counter. Last-resort avoidance when everything else fails.
Crouching block. Covers low + mid attacks. Always feasible, minimal commitment.
